flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at St Charles Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.5k → $6.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at St Charles Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at St Charles Community College fell 28% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.7k → $6.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at St Charles Community College fell 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($2.3k → $1.9k).
